reviews.text: Absolutely amazing! He made the whole process so much easier and made sure that the event went even more perfectly than I could have imagined. He went above and beyond in every way imaginable and I will forever be grateful for all his help. He made the whole thing feel personal and easy while maintaining the professional feel. Made sure to take the time to get to know us a little bit in order to make the photos feel personal and reflect our personalities. I highly recommend him for any event, especially proposals!

Andrew is a gifted photographer! The photos he took of our wedding far exceeded our expectations, and his professionalism made the entire experience feel easy and well worth the affordable rates. My partner and I are already discussing our next photo shoot with Authentic Moments Photography! Can’t recommend enough!

This was my first professional photoshoot and for a milestone birthday! So it was very important to me and Andrew understood that and was able to help guide me into the photos of my dreams.  I'm thrilled with how they turned out and I can't wait to work with Andrew again, he made me feel very comfortable and the photos came out incredible!

I cannot overstate how fantastic Andrew was to work with. My partner and I had never been photographed before and with it being a more intimate shoot we felt very nervous but Andrew put us right at ease with a friendly demeanor and tons of helpful tips. I'm so so happy with the pictures we got, I feel like he really captured our dynamic and brought our vision to life!! I also appreciated his flexibility with planning and scheduling, everything about the process was smooth and easy!

As a guy doing boudoir, I was nervous of shooting with a new male photographer but Andrew was so chill and made me feel so comfortable. He’s so talented and our photos came out so good! Can’t wait to shoot with him again. 🥰 unfortunately can’t share our photos on here 😉
